**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

LG Electronics Nanjing New Technology Co., Ltd. is a verified, major Tier-1 foreign-invested manufacturing hub for the South Korean conglomerate LG Electronics (LGE). Established in 1997 as a Sino-foreign joint venture with a massive fully paid-in capital of 23.92 million USD, it serves as a critical global production node. This is corroborated by its corporate email domain (@lge.com) and a substantial direct workforce of 539 insured employees in 2024. Located in the Nanjing Economic and Technological Development Zone, the facility operates a large-scale manufacturing plant specializing in the design and production of consumer electronics displays, including flat-panel digital TVs, PC monitors, projectors, and electronic whiteboards. Furthermore, its business scope explicitly includes the import/export of automotive electronics and active leasing of its own factory space, indicating a diversified and highly operational industrial campus.
